<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Lena Thompson LLC — Cybersecurity & Web Design Services</title>

<!-- Open Graph / Social Preview -->
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://lenathompsonllc.com">
<meta property="og:title" content="Lena Thompson LLC — Cybersecurity Consulting & Web Design">
<meta property="og:description" content="Web & app security testing, vulnerability assessments, security awareness training, and web design for small businesses. Real findings. Plain-English reports.">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://lenathompsonllc.com/og-image.png">
<meta property="og:image:width" content="1200">
<meta property="og:image:height" content="630">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
<meta name="twitter:title" content="Lena Thompson LLC — Cybersecurity Consulting & Web Design">
<meta name="twitter:description" content="Web & app security testing, vulnerability assessments, and web design for small businesses.">
<meta name="twitter:image" content="https://lenathompsonllc.com/og-image.png">
<meta name="description" content="Lena Thompson LLC offers cybersecurity consulting, web & app security testing, vulnerability assessments, security awareness training, and web design for small businesses.">

<!-- Favicon from logo -->
<link rel="icon" type="image/jpeg" href="data:image/jpeg;base64,">

<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  body {
    font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Arial, sans-serif;
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 1.7;
    color: #1a1a1a;
    background: #f9f8f5;
    padding: 2.5rem 1.5rem;
  }
  .container { max-width: 860px; margin: 0 auto; }

  /* Header */
  .site-header { margin-bottom: 2.5rem; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1.25rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .site-header .logo { height: 72px; width: auto; border-radius: 10px; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .site-header .header-text {}
  .site-header h1 { font-size: 26px; font-weight: 600; color: #111; margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .site-header .tagline { font-size: 14px; color: #888; }
  .site-header .contact-bar { margin-top: 8px; font-size: 13px; color: #555; }
  .site-header .contact-bar a { color: #0F6E56; text-decoration: none; }

  .section-label {
    font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.09em;
    color: #999; text-transform: uppercase; margin: 2.5rem 0 0.5rem;
  }
  .section-title { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; color: #111; margin: 0 0 0.25rem; }
  .section-note { font-size: 13px; color: #666; line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 1rem; }

  .pkg-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
    gap: 12px;
    margin: 1rem 0 1.5rem;
  }
  .pkg-card {
    background: #fff;
    border: 0.5px solid #e0ddd6;
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 1.25rem;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px;
  }
  .pkg-card.featured-teal  { border: 2px solid #1D9E75; }
  .pkg-card.featured-purple { border: 2px solid #534AB7; }

  .badge {
    display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600;
    padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 6px; margin-bottom: 4px; width: fit-content;
  }
  .badge.teal   { background: #E1F5EE; color: #0F6E56; }
  .badge.blue   { background: #E6F1FB; color: #185FA5; }
  .badge.purple { background: #EEEDFE; color: #534AB7; }

  .pkg-name  { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: #111; }
  .pkg-price { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 600; color: #111; line-height: 1.2; }
  .pkg-sub   { font-size: 12px; color: #999; margin-top: -2px; }

  .pkg-items { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 10px 0 0; font-size: 13px; color: #555; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }
  .pkg-items li::before { content: "✓  "; color: #1D9E75; font-weight: 700; }

  hr.divider { border: none; border-top: 0.5px solid #e0ddd6; margin: 2rem 0; }

  .footer-note {
    background: #fff; border: 0.5px solid #e0ddd6; border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 1.1rem 1.25rem; font-size: 13px; color: #555; line-height: 1.7; margin-top: 1.5rem;
  }
  .footer-note strong { color: #111; }

  .cta-block { margin-top: 2rem; padding: 1.5rem; background: #fff; border-radius: 12px; border: 0.5px solid #e0ddd6; }
  .cta-block p { font-size: 14px; color: #444; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
  .cta-block a {
    display: inline-block; padding: 9px 20px; border-radius: 8px;
    background: #1D9E75; color: #fff; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600;
    text-decoration: none; margin-right: 8px; margin-top: 4px;
  }
  .cta-block a:hover { background: #0F6E56; }

  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    .pkg-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    body { padding: 1.5rem 1rem; }
    .site-header .logo { height: 52px; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="container">

  <header class="site-header">
    <img class="logo" src="data:imag
